reviews.review_description: I love the idea of a co-op CPR /AED, and calibrating to a mannequin is cool. This is fun to try and play with even when you don't speak Danish, I did struggle to get the bystanders to get me an AED in all playthroughs sometimes it worked sometimes it didn't, they didn't understand me either. You need a huge play area, and it got aggravating once it started randomly teleporting me and boundaries around the set and the hand tracking went sideways a few times especially with the scissors. This is compression only CPR but I would have liked better airway management and a compression depth as well as timer. Price is right and it feels slick other than opening the airway even if it's buggy. Feels like the start of something that could be good.
